race.comment: ZOUGOTME (5) handy gelding unlucky not to get off the mark last prep. Showed good speed on resumption before knocking up late with a game second over 1200m at Kembla Grange. Nose roll comes off and has the speed to get over from the wide draw. Has the talent to take care of these. TIGER TOM (8) drifted back on debut before launching late with a respectable fourth over 1080m at Canberra Acton. Ready for this trip and further now and no shock to see him finish over the top of them. MANDY CANRUN (6) found them too sharp on debut with a closing fifth over 1010m at this track. Desperate for this journey now and not without each-way prospects. The chances don't end there. MANDY CANRUN (6) sound debut here with a narrow fifth over 1010m. Extra trip in her favour and sure to be around the money.
